title: Software Tester

company.name: Tetra Edge Infra LLP
company.about: Tetra Edge Infra LLP is a leading technology solutions provider specializing in quality assurance, software testing, and infrastructure management. We strive to deliver robust and error-free software to our global clientele.

description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented Software Tester to join our QA team. You will be responsible for ensuring the quality and reliability of our software applications. The ideal candidate will be highly analytical and possess a strong technical background.

At Tetra Edge Infra LLP, we believe that software quality is paramount to delivering outstanding user experiences. In this role, you will work closely with our development and product teams to identify bugs, establish testing protocols, and automate repetitive tasks.

Key Responsibilities:
- Review and analyze system specifications to ensure complete test coverage.
- Design and execute detailed, comprehensive, and well-structured test plans, scenarios, and scripts.
- Identify, record, document thoroughly, and track bugs using JIRA.
- Perform thorough regression testing when bugs are resolved to ensure overall system stability.
- Collaborate actively with developers to improve software performance and reliability.
- Stay up-to-date with new testing tools and test strategies.
- Develop and apply testing processes for new and existing products to meet client needs.

Requirements & Qualifications:
- Proven experience as a Quality Assurance Tester, Software Tester, or similar role.
- Solid understanding of software development life cycle (SDLC) and QA methodologies.
- Familiarity with Agile frameworks and regression testing techniques.
- Hands-on experience with automated testing tools (e.g., Selenium, Appium) is a huge plus.
- Ability to document and troubleshoot complex software errors effectively.
- Excellent communication skills and a team-player mindset.
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.

Join us and be a part of an innovative team dedicated to delivering excellence!

title: Full Stack Java Developer

company.name: Optalon Hr Consultant Private Limited
company.about: Providing top-notch HR consulting and IT recruitment services.

description:
We are seeking a highly motivated Full Stack Java Developer to join our growing team. In this role, you will be responsible for the end-to-end development of scalable web applications using Java, Spring Boot, React, and MySQL.

At Optalon HR Consultant, we pride ourselves on building innovative solutions that drive business success. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy high-quality software solutions.

Key Responsibilities:
- Design and develop robust server-side logic using Java and Spring Boot.
- Build dynamic and responsive user interfaces using React.
- Design, implement, and maintain database schemas in MySQL.
- Optimize application performance for maximum speed and scalability.
- Collaborate with product managers and designers to understand user requirements.
- Participate in code reviews to ensure code quality and best practices.
- Troubleshoot and debug complex technical issues.

Requirements & Qualifications:
- 1-3 years of proven experience as a Full Stack Developer or similar role.
- Strong proficiency in Java, Spring Boot, and RESTful APIs.
- Solid experience with modern frontend frameworks, particularly React.
- Knowledge of relational databases (MySQL) and ORM technologies.
- Understanding of version control systems (Git) and CI/CD pipelines.
- Excellent problem-solving skills and a strong attention to detail.
- A collaborative mindset and the ability to work in an Agile environment.

title: Software Development Engineer

company.name: PMY Infoservices Private Limited
company.about: Innovating software solutions for modern businesses.

description:
We are looking for an enthusiastic Software Development Engineer to join our dynamic team at PMY Infoservices. You will be instrumental in building innovative software solutions that address complex business challenges.

As an SDE, you will be part of a collaborative environment where your ideas and contributions directly impact our greenfield projects. We value creativity, strong problem-solving skills, and a passion for technology.

Key Responsibilities:
- Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code in JavaScript and Python.
- Participate in the entire software development lifecycle, from concept to deployment.
- Collaborate with senior engineers to design robust system architectures.
- Implement software enhancements and bug fixes.
- Conduct thorough unit testing and integration testing.
- Continuously discover, evaluate, and implement new technologies to maximize development efficiency.

Requirements & Qualifications:
- 0-2 years of experience in software development (freshers with strong projects are welcome).
- Proficiency in JavaScript and Python programming languages.
- Solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, and software design principles.
- Experience with backend frameworks (e.g., Node.js, Django) is a plus.
- Familiarity with version control (Git).
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field.

title: Website Developer
description:
Cosmic 365 AI is seeking a talented Website Developer to design, build, and maintain high-performing websites for our innovative AI platform. You will be at the forefront of creating digital experiences that showcase our cutting-edge technology.

In this remote role, you will have the flexibility to work from home while collaborating with a distributed team of designers and engineers.

Key Responsibilities:
- Design and develop engaging and responsive websites using HTML, CSS, PHP, and WordPress.
- Customize WordPress themes and plugins to meet specific project requirements.
- Ensure websites are optimized for speed, scalability, and SEO best practices.
- Collaborate with the design team to translate UI/UX wireframes into functional web pages.
- Implement security measures to protect websites from vulnerabilities.
- Perform regular website maintenance, updates, and troubleshooting.
- Integrate third-party APIs and services as needed.

Requirements & Qualifications:
- 3-5 years of proven experience as a Website Developer or WordPress Developer.
- Strong proficiency in front-end technologies (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript/jQuery).
- Extensive experience with PHP and WordPress architecture.
- Knowledge of responsive design principles and mobile-first development.
- Familiarity with SEO principles and website performance optimization tools.
- Excellent communication skills and the ability to work independently in a remote setting.
- A strong portfolio demonstrating previous web development projects.

title: Automation Integration Engineer
description:
The Confident Group is looking for an experienced Automation Integration Engineer to lead the design and implementation of our continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines. You will play a crucial role in enhancing our software delivery process.

Join our industry-leading team and help us build robust automation frameworks that accelerate development cycles and ensure high-quality releases.

Key Responsibilities:
- Design, build, and maintain automated CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitLab CI.
- Develop and implement infrastructure as code (IaC) using Ansible, Terraform, or similar tools.
- Integrate automated testing frameworks into the deployment pipeline.
- Monitor and troubleshoot pipeline failures and system performance issues.
- Collaborate with development and QA teams to streamline the release process.
- Implement security best practices within the automation workflows.
- Continuously evaluate and adopt new automation tools and methodologies.

Requirements & Qualifications:
- 2-5 years of experience in DevOps, Automation Engineering, or a related field.
- Strong expertise in CI/CD tools, particularly Jenkins.
- Solid scripting skills in Python, Bash, or Groovy.
- Hands-on experience with configuration management tools like Ansible or Chef.
- Deep understanding of containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes).
- Experience working with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
- Excellent analytical and problem-solving capabilities.

title: Web Designer
description:
i Soft Technologies is hiring a creative and detail-oriented Web Designer for a part-time remote position. You will be responsible for creating visually stunning and user-friendly web interfaces for a variety of client projects.

We are looking for someone with a keen eye for design and a solid understanding of modern UI/UX principles to help us elevate our digital presence.

Key Responsibilities:
- Conceptualize and design intuitive website layouts and user interfaces.
- Create wireframes, storyboards, user flows, and site maps to effectively communicate interaction and design ideas.
- Design compelling graphics, icons, and visual elements using Figma and Adobe XD.
- Collaborate with web developers to ensure technical feasibility and accurate implementation of designs.
- Establish and promote design guidelines, best practices, and standards.
- Keep up-to-date with the latest web design trends and technologies.
- Revise designs based on client feedback and usability testing results.

Requirements & Qualifications:
- 3-6 years of professional experience in web design or UI/UX design.
- A strong portfolio showcasing innovative web design projects.
- Proficiency in design tools like Figma, Adobe XD, Photoshop, and Illustrator.
- Solid understanding of HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript (to facilitate collaboration with developers).
- Excellent visual design skills with sensitivity to user-system interaction.
- Ability to solve problems creatively and effectively.
- Strong time-management skills and the ability to work independently part-time.

title: Engineering Trainee
description:
Randstad India Private Limited is currently recruiting dynamic and motivated Engineering Trainees to join our comprehensive training program. This is a fantastic opportunity for fresh graduates to kickstart their careers in the IT industry.

As an Engineering Trainee, you will undergo rigorous training in various software development methodologies and programming languages, preparing you for a successful career in tech.

Key Responsibilities:
- Participate actively in technical training sessions and workshops.
- Learn and apply programming concepts in C++, Java, and other relevant technologies.
- Assist senior developers in coding, debugging, and testing software applications.
- Complete assigned coding exercises and mini-projects within deadlines.
- Collaborate with peers to solve complex technical problems.
- Understand and follow standard software development life cycle (SDLC) processes.
- Document code and technical specifications as required.

Requirements & Qualifications:
- Fresh graduate with a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics, or a related engineering discipline (0-1 year experience).
- Strong foundational knowledge of basic programming concepts and object-oriented programming (OOP).
- Familiarity with C++ or Java is highly preferred.
- Excellent logical and analytical reasoning skills.
- Eagerness to learn new technologies and adapt to a fast-paced environment.
- Good communication and interpersonal skills.
- Ability to work effectively in a team.
